title: What about 30 and 3010 CRC
wikitext:
[]: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed Jan 04, 2023 2:27 pm Hi all I was wondering did we ever get any info whatsoever about the publishing of the Complete Record Collection of the 3rd and 4th installment? Also, were the 1.0 and 3.0 CRCs published also in English or other languages? Thanks for any reply

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 04, 2023 8:48 pm The 3.0 CRCs have started publishing, technically. However we only got a volume that was screenshots of the film basically (3.333 version). I think we were supposed to get further volumes with the usual production material last year, but it got seriously delayed it seems. They had their covers revealed and all, but no current release date. The 3.0+1.0 CRC is confirmed too, but I imagine it won't come till after the 3.0 ones. And these books have never been released in English.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Thu Jan 05, 2023 1:34 pm @kuribo thank you very much! Can you link me to the book you were talking about? Is the one with Kawo and Shinji sketched on the cover and it has just screen shots from 3.333?

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Jan 05, 2023 7:34 pm Yes, it's the book with Kaworu and Shinji on the cover. You can check out my review of that book here: Evangelion Shin Gekijouban: Q Zen Kiroku Zenshuu Visual Story Ban I hope that helps!

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jan 05, 2023 8:39 pm No problem! And thanks for linking it Literary Eagle. ^^

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Fri Jan 06, 2023 12:25 pm Bought both the 2 from 3.0 and the other 2 for thrice On the overseas part of the Eva store that links you to buyee When I get ‘em gonna post all of the pages so somebody will hopefully translate

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Jan 06, 2023 12:57 pm They're coming out eventually. The 1.0 and 2.0 CRCs were also released like this, it was Groundworks first and then the interview collection, making up the CRC at the end. You probably know they withheld the 3.0 CRC because it'd be too spoilerific for 3.0+1.0. According to the interviewer for them (and previous ones also): tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) "There's quite a lot material that will make you go "ehh!?" You asked about them being published in English and that's a no, although it's more likely they have been translated to Chinese and/or Korean. You omitted the 2.0 CRC from your question so I assume you thought of the gwern's collection of the 2.0 CRC, but that's all fan translations, *and* they're incomplete. Check out the wiki articles below, we actually got a missing portion of the 2.0 CRC translated (some were also just missing from gwern' archive), and major portions of the 1.0 CRC done also, which were fairly obscure (even though they were released in 2008), but very illuminating. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_1. ... Collection https://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_2. ... Collection

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Fri Jan 06, 2023 1:34 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Mon Feb 06, 2023 10:30 am So silly I bought the Groundworks Guess I am gonna sell ‘em all o eBay or somewhere I was really convinced they were the CRC

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Mar 08, 2023 10:27 am https://www.khara.co.jp/2023/03/08/pse/ The official Colour book 'Project Shin Evangelion' (edited by Colour Co., Ltd.) is now available. How was "Shin Evangelion the Movie" managed and executed as a project? The official book "Shin Eva" as a project, "Project Shin Evangelion", has been reviewed and verified by Colour Inc. itself, and Hideaki Anno has given a "project summary". The book will include: 1. A project management report summarising the production status of "Shin Evangelion the Movie", including targets, processes, systems, costs, timeframes and the results of the introduction of pre-visualisation. 2. Interview with Hideaki Anno, General Director and Executive Producer of Shin Evangelion The Movie, on the 'Project Wrap-Up'. 3. Project summary" interview with Hideaki Anno, General Director and Executive Producer of "Shin Evangelion the Movie". Kazuya Tsurumaki (director of Shin Evangelion the Movie), Masahiro Maeda (director), Kazuki Todoroki (assistant to the general director), Moyoco Anno (director of Colour), Tomoyuki Ogata (vice president of Colour), Ryosei Kawakami (external director of Colour), Katsuro Ogami (special effects director), Nozomu Takahashi (researcher at the NPO Anime Special Effects Archive Organisation) Project evaluation" interviews with nine people: Toshio Suzuki (producer and representative director of Studio Ghibli). 4. All participating staff credits for Shin Eva Product information (planned). Colour official book "Project Shin Evangelion" (edited by Colour Co., Ltd.) -Achievements, Reflections, Evaluations, Summaries-. A5 size, softcover / 256 pages (planned) / B&W / Paperback (*E-book version also planned) Price: 1,760 yen (incl. tax) Main body price: 1,600 yen + tax Scheduled release date: Late May ISBN code: 978-4-905033-31-8 Published by Colour Inc. Sales Groundworks Inc. The images and book specifications are subject to change without notice.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Mar 08, 2023 1:48 pm hope there will still be enough ppl lurking 'round here to bother translating it

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by AlphaZero » Wed Mar 08, 2023 10:44 pm Wait a minute, if Shin's CRC ends up releasing in May does this mean it's going to come out before 3.0's CRC or are both movies in one?

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat May 13, 2023 7:15 pm They're delaying the 3.0+1.0 interview book to mid-July due to "increased content". I wager this might be because of the increased interest in -46h and -120min, which might be included here. https://www.khara.co.jp/2023/05/12/20230512/

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Jun 29, 2023 10:53 pm Aaand it's coming out on July 14th. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jul 08, 2023 7:21 pm Looking at those images I noticed the storyboard pages and god I wish we get a storyboard book sooner rather than later.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jul 09, 2023 7:09 am kuribo-04 wrote: Looking at those images I noticed the storyboard pages and god I wish we get a storyboard book sooner rather than later.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jul 09, 2023 2:47 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I'm a bit confused, I was lead to believe Shin Eva wasn't storyboarded? Anno said something like he didn't want to do it in the Making Of documentary.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Jul 10, 2023 3:48 pm Hey folks, I just want to say I will probably be able to get the interviews transcribed not long after release, and we should be able to get translations going soon after. I'm personally very interested in what they have to say but I'm sure it'll be a pretty massive body of text. So if you think/know anyone else that can help with it please ask them if they're interested.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Jul 10, 2023 8:26 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Hey folks, I just want to say I will probably be able to get the interviews transcribed not long after release, and we should be able to get translations going soon after. I'm personally very interested in what they have to say but I'm sure it'll be a pretty massive body of text. So if you think/know anyone else that can help with it please ask them if they're interested.

[]: Re: What about 3.0 and 3.0+1.0 CRC?             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Jul 13, 2023 10:04 am FelipeFritschF wrote: Hey folks, I just want to say I will probably be able to get the interviews transcribed not long after release, and we should be able to get translations going soon after. I'm personally very interested in what they have to say but I'm sure it'll be a pretty massive body of text. So if you think/know anyone else that can help with it please ask them if they're interested.
